Vinglish.name: Vinglish
Vinglish.deleteAllConfirmText: Once gone, it's fucking gone. Don’t come crying like a bitch!
Vinglish.deleteAllEmptyMessage: Deleting... what exactly? Your imaginary bullshit? At least write something first, dumbass!
Vinglish.deletePostConfirmText: This shit ain't coming back, just like your last relationship!
Vinglish.noPostsMessage: Nothing here. Start typing before you bitch about it!
Vinglish.noResultsMessage: Nothing, loser. Either you typed like an idiot or your notes are garbage.
Vinglish.exportEmptyMessage: Exporting what? Empty fucking space? Try writing before acting smart!
Vinglish.importErrorInvalidFile: Wrong fucking file, dipshit. We take JSON, not your mom’s love letters!
Vinglish.importErrorNotThoughts: This ain’t from Thoughts. What is this, some shady ass JSON from the dark web?
Vinglish.importErrorInvalidFormat: Format’s fucked. Did a toddler make this JSON?
Vinglish.importErrorInvalidJSON: Dude, even JSON is rejecting your bullshit. Fix it!
Vinglish.importConfirmText: Got old notes. Merge ‘em or fuck ‘em?
Vinglish.importSuccessMerge: Merged! Your old shit now mixed with new shit!
Vinglish.importSuccessReplace: Replaced! Hope you didn’t need that garbage.
Vinglish.importSuccessFirst: Imported! Finally putting some garbage in here!
Vinglish.footerOfflineText: Install Thoughts and fuck off from the internet:
Vinglish.footerAndroidGuide: Android: Menu (⋮) > Slam It On Your Home screen.
Vinglish.footerIOSGuide: iOS: Share (⬆) > Stick This On Your Home Screen.
Vinglish.footerPrivacy: Your notes, your bullshit. We don’t snoop.
Vinglish.discardConfirmText: You sure? Ain’t no undo, dumbfuck!

shinglish.name: SHinglish
shinglish.deleteAllConfirmText: Ek baar delete ho gaya toh bas, lavde! Baad mein chutiya mat banna.
shinglish.deleteAllEmptyMessage: Bhosdike, kya uda raha hai? Pehle kuch likh toh!
shinglish.deletePostConfirmText: Ek baar delete kiya toh gaya, jaise tera paisa IPL betting me!
shinglish.noPostsMessage: Kuch nahi hai idhar, pehle likh madarchod!
shinglish.noResultsMessage: Kuch nahi mila, lagta hai dimaag offline hai land!
shinglish.exportEmptyMessage: Export kya karega, hawa? Saale pehle likh toh!
shinglish.importErrorInvalidFile: Sirf JSON chalega, yeh kya chutiyapa uthake laaya hai?
shinglish.importErrorNotThoughts: Yeh Chutiyapa ka JSON nahi hai! Kahan se uthaya yeh gand?
shinglish.importErrorInvalidFormat: Yeh JSON hai ya kisi baba ka bhavishya? Poora chutiyapa!
shinglish.importErrorInvalidJSON: Bhai, yeh JSON hai ya tatti? Bilkul bekaar!
shinglish.importConfirmText: Seal Phele se Fati hai, to new laani hai yaa yeh hi kaafi hai?
shinglish.importSuccessMerge: Seal wali gand mila di, ab naya bhi mil gaya!
shinglish.importSuccessFirst: Import ho gaya! Abh apni gaand marwa or likh!
shinglish.footerOfflineText: Chutiyapa ko offline install kar madarchod:
shinglish.footerAndroidGuide: Android: Menu (⋮) > Home Screen pe chipka, lavde!
shinglish.footerIOSGuide: iOS: Share (⬆) > Home Screen pe chipka, chutiye!
shinglish.footerPrivacy: Chutiyapa safe hai, bas tera dimaag nahi, lavde!
shinglish.discardConfirmText: Soch le behenchod, baad me randi rona matkarna!
shinglish.footerMadeWithLove: Dil se nahi, chutiyaap se banaya!
shinglish.footerRightsReserved: © 2025 Chutiyapa. Chori mat kar, warna thokenge!
